title: BEM-866 poll Claude write
objective:
Run script:
"""
response = Path('governance/audit/mailbox/from_claude/BEM865_CLAUDE_WRITE_SELFTEST_RESPONSE.md')
text = response.read_text(encoding='utf-8') if response.exists() else ''
lines = [line.strip() for line in text.splitlines()]
ok = 'Status: CLAUDE_WRITE_OK' in lines
if ok:
    status = 'CLAUDE_WRITE_OK_CONFIRMED'
else:
    status = 'WAITING_FOR_CLAUDE_WRITE'
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM866_POLL_CLAUDE_WRITE_' + status + '.md')
marker.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
marker.write_text('# BEM-866 poll Claude write\nStatus: ' + status + '\nResponse exists: ' + str(response.exists()) + '\n\nResponse text:\n' + text[:2000] + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(marker))
ops_applied.append('poll Claude write after dispatch: ' + status)
"""
